title: calamagrostis alpicola
intro: Calamagrostis alpicola, also known as alpine fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis alpicola include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Calamagrostis alpicola often involve infusions or teas made from the dried plant, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
